No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its various dimensions.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course objectives explicitly mention 'self-growth' and analyzing 'dilemmas encountered by the self,' which directly supports mental health and well-being (Target 3.4). Both models converged on this score and reasoning.
